description_long: This is a pair of sporty sunglasses featuring a bold, full-rim rectangular frame with a matte black finish. The lenses are a striking, opaque red, providing a strong visual contrast to the frame. The temples are straight and slightly thick, adorned with prominent blue and white text and graphics, including the word 'TAIWAN' and a stylized red motif. The bridge is a simple, integrated design that smoothly connects the two lenses without any visible nose pads. The overall style is modern and energetic, suitable for urban environments and outdoor activities. The glasses exude a sense of individuality and flair, making them a fashionable accessory for city dwellers.
description: Sporty, full-rim black sunglasses with bold red lenses and graphic-adorned temples. Modern, eye-catching design with prominent 'TAIWAN' branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rectangular red lenses and the full-rim black frame, highlighting the bold color contrast.
description_view_1: Left-side view reveals the straight temple with blue and white 'TAIWAN' graphics and a red motif, as well as the lens thickness.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the inside of the frame and temples, with the graphics on both temples visible and the bridge's simple connection.
description_view_3: Right-side view mirrors the left, showing the same graphic details and the frame's thickness.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with a sporty, slightly thick profile and straight temples. The design is streamlined and modern, with no visible embellishments on the front but bold graphics on the temples.
attribute_lens_tint: Opaque, solid red tint with no visible gradient or transparency. The lenses appear uniform in color and are not mirrored.
attribute_bridge_style: Simple, integrated bridge that smoothly connects the two lenses without any separation or nose pads. The bridge is straight and unembellished.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight, moderately thick, and feature prominent blue and white 'TAIWAN' text with a red graphic motif. The detailing is printed and visually striking, adding a unique flair.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo or insignia is visible on both temples, printed in blue and white with the word 'TAIWAN' and a red motif.
